description: A customer calls the store to ask if a specific item is in stock.

nodes.task_description: Get the product name or item number from the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent understands which product to look for.

nodes.task_description: Use the inventory management system to look up the item's current on-hand quantity.

expected_outcome.expected: The system shows the current stock level for the item.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer whether the item is in stock and offer to hold it for them.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent accurately answers the customer's question and provides helpful service.
